task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings for the 'IT Support' mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout web interface shows the settings page specifically for the 'IT Support' mailbox.
The Auto-Reply settings tab or section is open and visible within the mailbox settings.
The auto-reply subject input field contains exactly: We've received your request - IT Support

task_completion.description: Include the 24-hour acknowledgment in the message body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The auto-reply message body text area contains the exact phrase: within 24 hours

task_completion.description: Include the scheduled maintenance notice in the message body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The auto-reply message body text area contains the exact phrase: December 14-15

task_completion.description: Include the emergency contact number in the message body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The auto-reply message body text area contains the exact phrase: (555) 987-6543
A success notification (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible, or the auto-reply toggle is shown as active/enabled with the configured text saved in the form.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeScout web interface to configure the auto-reply
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeScout web UI in a browser, rather than terminal commands, API requests, or database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the actual application input fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The subject and body text are typed into the FreeScout Auto-Reply form fields, not just written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The success state and UI appear genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface looks like standard FreeScout without signs of browser developer tools being used to fake the saved state or text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in FreeScout. The target mailbox is 'IT Support' (it-support@helpdesk.local). The auto-reply subject must be exactly: 'We've received your request - IT Support'. The message body must contain these three exact phrases: 'within 24 hours', 'December 14-15', and '(555) 987-6543'.
